footer.brandDescription: The premium car detailing studio in Leiria. Because your car deserves more than just a simple wash.

01.title: Quotes and Evaluation
01.content: The prices shown on our website are estimates based on vehicles with a standard condition. LeiriaDetail reserves the right to adjust the final quote after on-site inspection, if extreme contamination or undeclared damage is detected.

02.title: Cancellation Policy
02.content: We work exclusively by appointment to ensure the time and dedication required for each detail. We request that any cancellation or rescheduling be communicated with at least 24 Hours notice.

03.title: Liability
03.content: LeiriaDetail is not responsible for valuables left inside vehicles. We recommend removing all personal belongings before delivering the vehicle to our studio.

04.title: Dispute Resolution
04.content1: In case of dispute, the consumer may resort to an Alternative Consumer Dispute Resolution Entity (RAL).

01.title: Data Controller
01.content: LeiriaDetail, operating under strict technical standards in Leiria, is the entity responsible for collecting and processing your data. We guarantee absolute transparency and certified protection, treating your privacy with the same detail we apply to the vehicles in our studio.

02.title: Data and Technical Purpose
02.description: We collect exclusively the minimum data necessary to provide excellent services in our studio:

scheduling.title: Appointment Management
scheduling.description: Name, phone contact and email for confirmation and technical coordination.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Tax data to comply with all legal obligations in force.

vehicle.title: Vehicle Identification
vehicle.description: Brand, model and license plate for internal organization and process registration.

03.title: User Rights (GDPR)
03.content: In compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the right to access, rectify, limit or delete your data. We handle all requests with technical priority.

01.title: What are Cookies?
01.content: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser to optimize technical performance and ensure the correct functioning of online booking systems. At LeiriaDetail, we use this technology to enhance your experience and ensure browsing security.

technical.title: Technical Cookies
technical.description: Essential to keep your session active during the booking process and ensure the integrity of website security. These cookies do not collect information for marketing.

analytics.title: Analytical Cookies
analytics.description: We use anonymous data (Google Analytics) to understand how customers interact with our online studio, allowing us to optimize the booking flow and services.

03.title: Cookie Management
03.content: You can configure your browser to refuse cookies at any time. We warn, however, that critical parts of our technical platform may lose functionality or prevent the completion of bookings.
03.browserHint:
Check your browser's privacy settings
(Chrome, Safari, Firefox) to manage permissions.
